subcodes.first_line: Grieve thou not over anything; We beseech God that He may transform the crescent moon of thy hope into a full-orbed moon, and the star of thy yearning into a radiant sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لا تحزن من شیء نسئل الله ان یجعل هلال املک بدرا کاملا و نجم طلبک شمسا مشرقه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @outward and inward meanings, @spiritual transformation
